requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — LED Lamp / Luminaire (Mandatory TIS, e.g. TIS 2780)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——LED 灯/灯具（强制性 TIS，如 TIS 2780）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——LED 燈/燈具（強制性 TIS，如 TIS 2780）

summary.en: LED lamps and luminaires sold in Thailand that fall within a controlled-product list must comply with the applicable mandatory TIS safety standard and bear the TIS mark. For self-ballasted LED lamps, the relevant mandatory safety standard is commonly cited as TIS 2780 (LED lamp safety, adopting IEC 62560 content); luminaire-level safety follows TIS standards adopting the IEC 60598 series. The standard covers protection against electric shock, insulation and dielectric strength, creepage and clearance, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and marking. Conformity is assessed by a TISI-recognised laboratory, and the product is covered by a TIS licence held by an in-country manufacturer or importer. Design must suit Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (220-240 V range; same 50 Hz as China, nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V). Confirm the exact TIS number and edition in force for the specific lamp/luminaire type.
summary.zh: 在泰国销售并落入受控产品清单的 LED 灯及灯具，须符合适用的强制性 TIS 安全标准并加贴 TIS 标志。就自镇流 LED 灯，相关强制性安全标准常引用为 TIS 2780（LED 灯安全，采用 IEC 62560 内容）；灯具级安全遵循采用 IEC 60598 系列的 TIS 标准。该标准涵盖防触电、绝缘及介电强度、爬电距离与电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及标示。合格评定由 TISI 认可实验室进行，产品由在地制造商或进口商持有的 TIS 许可证覆盖。设计须适配泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 电网（220-240 V 范围；与中国同为 50 Hz，额定电压不同于中国 220 V）。请就具体灯/灯具类型确认现行 TIS 编号及版本。
summary.zht: 在泰國銷售並落入受控產品清單的 LED 燈及燈具，須符合適用的強制性 TIS 安全標準並加貼 TIS 標誌。就自鎮流 LED 燈，相關強制性安全標準常引用為 TIS 2780（LED 燈安全，採用 IEC 62560 內容）；燈具級安全遵循採用 IEC 60598 系列的 TIS 標準。該標準涵蓋防觸電、絕緣及介電強度、爬電距離與電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及標示。合格評定由 TISI 認可實驗室進行，產品由在地製造商或進口商持有的 TIS 許可證覆蓋。設計須適配泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 電網（220-240 V 範圍；與中國同為 50 Hz，額定電壓不同於中國 220 V）。請就具體燈/燈具類型確認現行 TIS 編號及版本。

standards_or_laws: TIS 2780 — Self-ballasted LED lamp safety (mandatory TIS adopting IEC 62560; confirm exact number and edition)
TIS standards adopting the IEC 60598 series — Luminaires general safety requirements (TISI, Ministry of Industry)

summary.en: China's general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; for self-ballasted LED lamps the relevant safety standard is GB 24906 / GB 16915-series and the IEC 62560-aligned requirements applied under CCC. CCC certification, administered by CNCA via CQC, covers safety broadly comparable to the IEC-based content, but the conformity assessment, marking (CCC mark), documentation language, and licensing are separate and non-mutual with the Thai TIS scheme. CN products are rated for 220 V / 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；就自镇流 LED 灯，相关安全标准为 GB 24906 / GB 16915 系列及 CCC 下适用的与 IEC 62560 对齐的要求。CCC 认证由 CNCA 经 CQC 管理，涵盖与基于 IEC 内容大致相当的安全要求，但合格评定、标志（CCC 标志）、文件语言及许可均独立，与泰国 TIS 方案不互认。中国产品按 220 V / 50 Hz 额定。
summary.zht: 中國通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015；就自鎮流 LED 燈，相關安全標準為 GB 24906 / GB 16915 系列及 CCC 下適用的與 IEC 62560 對齊的要求。CCC 認證由 CNCA 經 CQC 管理，涵蓋與基於 IEC 內容大致相當的安全要求，但合格評定、標誌（CCC 標誌）、文件語言及許可均獨立，與泰國 TIS 方案不互認。中國產品按 220 V / 50 Hz 額定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026)
GB 24906 / IEC 62560-aligned self-ballasted LED lamp safety requirements under CCC (CNCA/CQC)

gap.en: Thai TIS lamp/luminaire safety and CN GB standards share an IEC base (IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 60598 for luminaires), so the core technical content is broadly harmonised. The gaps are procedural and jurisdictional: (1) Thailand requires mandatory third-party TIS certification with the TIS mark and an in-country licence holder; CN CCC certification and the CCC mark are not recognised for the Thai TIS licence; (2) testing must be by a TISI-recognised laboratory — CN CNAS/CQC reports are not automatically accepted; (3) the product rating and design verification must cover Thailand's 230 V (220-240 V) grid rather than only China's 220 V; (4) marking and rated data must be presented in Thai with the importer/licence-holder identity; (5) an import licence tied to the TIS scheme may be required before customs clearance. Exporters must re-test and re-certify for the Thai TIS licence rather than reuse the CN CCC file, and confirm the exact mandatory TIS number/edition for the specific product.
gap.zh: 泰国 TIS 灯/灯具安全与中国 GB 标准共享 IEC 基础（自镇流灯为 IEC 62560，灯具为 IEC 60598），故核心技术内容基本协调。差距属程序及管辖层面：（1）泰国要求强制性第三方 TIS 认证，配 TIS 标志及在地持证人；中国 CCC 认证及 CCC 标志不被泰国 TIS 许可所承认；（2）检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行——中国 CNAS/CQC 报告不自动被接受；（3）产品额定及设计验证须覆盖泰国 230 V（220-240 V）电网，而非仅中国 220 V；（4）标示及额定数据须以泰文呈现并附进口商/许可证持有人身份；（5）清关前可能须取得与 TIS 方案挂钩的进口许可。出口商须为泰国 TIS 许可重新检测及认证，而非沿用中国 CCC 文件，并确认具体产品的强制性 TIS 编号/版本。
gap.zht: 泰國 TIS 燈/燈具安全與中國 GB 標準共享 IEC 基礎（自鎮流燈為 IEC 62560，燈具為 IEC 60598），故核心技術內容基本協調。差距屬程序及管轄層面：（1）泰國要求強制性第三方 TIS 認證，配 TIS 標誌及在地持證人；中國 CCC 認證及 CCC 標誌不被泰國 TIS 許可所承認；（2）檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行——中國 CNAS/CQC 報告不自動被接受；（3）產品額定及設計驗證須覆蓋泰國 230 V（220-240 V）電網，而非僅中國 220 V；（4）標示及額定數據須以泰文呈現並附進口商/許可證持有人身份；（5）清關前可能須取得與 TIS 方案掛鈎的進口許可。出口商須為泰國 TIS 許可重新檢測及認證，而非沿用中國 CCC 文件，並確認具體產品的強制性 TIS 編號/版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — applicable TIS safety standard (e.g. TIS 2780 for LED lamps) and TIS mark required for controlled products; third-party TISI certification and in-country licence holder; confirm exact TIS number/edition
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lamps/luminaires that are controlled products in Thailand require mandatory TIS safety certification (e.g. TIS 2780 for self-ballasted LED lamps, IEC 62560-based) and the TIS mark, with testing by a TISI-recognised laboratory and a TIS licence held by an in-country manufacturer or importer. The technical content is broadly harmonised with CN GB standards via the shared IEC base, but Chinese CCC certification and CN test reports are not accepted for the TIS licence, and the design must suit Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz grid. Confirm the exact mandatory TIS number and edition for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在泰国属受控产品的 LED 灯/灯具须取得强制性 TIS 安全认证（如自镇流 LED 灯的 TIS 2780，基于 IEC 62560）及 TIS 标志，检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行，TIS 许可证由在地制造商或进口商持有。技术内容通过共享 IEC 基础与中国 GB 标准基本协调，但中国 CCC 认证及检测报告不被 TIS 许可所接受，且设计须适配泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 电网。请就具体产品确认强制性 TIS 编号及版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在泰國屬受控產品的 LED 燈/燈具須取得強制性 TIS 安全認證（如自鎮流 LED 燈的 TIS 2780，基於 IEC 62560）及 TIS 標誌，檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行，TIS 許可證由在地製造商或進口商持有。技術內容通過共享 IEC 基礎與中國 GB 標準基本協調，但中國 CCC 認證及檢測報告不被 TIS 許可所接受，且設計須適配泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 電網。請就具體產品確認強制性 TIS 編號及版本。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (TIS adopting IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（采用 IEC 61347-2-13 的 TIS）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（採用 IEC 61347-2-13 的 TIS）

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) intended for the Thai market are assessed against the applicable Thai safety standard, which adopts IEC 61347-2-13 content (particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic control gear for LED modules), and against IEC 61347-1 general control-gear requirements. Where the driver type is a controlled product, it requires its own TIS certification and the TIS mark in addition to the luminaire-level compliance; where it is integrated into the luminaire and not sold separately, its safety evidence forms part of the luminaire TIS technical file. The standard covers isolation/insulation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking. Drivers must be rated for the Thai 230 V / 50 Hz supply. Confirm whether the specific driver type/power range is a controlled product requiring standalone TIS certification.
summary.zh: 面向泰国市场的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）按适用泰国安全标准评估，该标准采用 IEC 61347-2-13 内容（直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）及 IEC 61347-1 通用控制装置要求。若驱动器类型为受控产品，则除灯具级合规外，须取得其自身的 TIS 认证及 TIS 标志；若集成于灯具内且非独立销售，其安全证据构成灯具 TIS 技术文件的一部分。该标准涵盖绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标示。驱动器须按泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 供电额定。请确认具体驱动器类型/功率范围是否为须独立 TIS 认证的受控产品。
summary.zht: 面向泰國市場的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）按適用泰國安全標準評估，該標準採用 IEC 61347-2-13 內容（直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）及 IEC 61347-1 通用控制裝置要求。若驅動器類型為受控產品，則除燈具級合規外，須取得其自身的 TIS 認證及 TIS 標誌；若集成於燈具內且非獨立銷售，其安全證據構成燈具 TIS 技術文件的一部分。該標準涵蓋絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標示。驅動器須按泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 供電額定。請確認具體驅動器類型/功率範圍是否為須獨立 TIS 認證的受控產品。

standards_or_laws: Thai safety standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13 — Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic control gear for LED modules (TISI, Ministry of Industry; confirm exact TIS number and edition)
IEC 61347-1 general control-gear safety requirements as adopted by TISI

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic control gear for LED modules), technically aligned with IEC 61347-2-13, alongside GB 19510.1 general requirements. CCC certification may be required for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese GB 19510.14 CCC test reports are domestic and are not automatically accepted for the Thai TIS certification of the driver.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），技术上与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐，并配合 GB 19510.1 通用要求。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。中国 GB 19510.14 CCC 检测报告属国内制度，不自动被泰国驱动器 TIS 认证所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），技術上與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊，並配合 GB 19510.1 通用要求。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。中國 GB 19510.14 CCC 檢測報告屬國內制度，不自動被泰國驅動器 TIS 認證所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic control gear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)
GB 19510.1 — Lamp control gear general requirements (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Thai driver safety requirements and CN GB 19510.14 share the IEC 61347-2-13 technical base, so the core content is largely harmonised. Gaps: (1) where the driver is a standalone controlled product, it requires its own Thai TIS certification and TIS mark, and a TIS licence held by an in-country entity; CN CCC certification of the driver is not recognised; (2) testing must be by a TISI-recognised laboratory — CN reports are not automatically accepted; (3) the driver must be rated for Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz supply rather than China's 220 V; (4) marking must be in Thai with importer/licence-holder identity; (5) the exact controlled-product scope and applicable TIS number/edition for drivers must be confirmed, as not all driver power ranges are necessarily controlled. When the driver is integrated and not sold separately, its evidence sits within the luminaire TIS technical file. Exporters should re-certify the driver for Thailand rather than relying on the CN CCC file.
gap.zh: 泰国驱动器安全要求与中国 GB 19510.14 共享 IEC 61347-2-13 技术基础，故核心内容基本协调。差距：（1）若驱动器为独立受控产品，须取得其自身的泰国 TIS 认证及 TIS 标志，并由在地实体持有 TIS 许可证；中国驱动器 CCC 认证不被承认；（2）检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行——中国报告不自动被接受；（3）驱动器须按泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 供电额定，而非中国 220 V；（4）标示须为泰文并附进口商/许可证持有人身份；（5）须确认驱动器的具体受控产品范围及适用 TIS 编号/版本，因并非所有驱动器功率范围均必然受控。当驱动器集成且非独立销售时，其证据置于灯具 TIS 技术文件内。出口商应为泰国重新认证驱动器，而非依赖中国 CCC 文件。
gap.zht: 泰國驅動器安全要求與中國 GB 19510.14 共享 IEC 61347-2-13 技術基礎，故核心內容基本協調。差距：（1）若驅動器為獨立受控產品，須取得其自身的泰國 TIS 認證及 TIS 標誌，並由在地實體持有 TIS 許可證；中國驅動器 CCC 認證不被承認；（2）檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行——中國報告不自動被接受；（3）驅動器須按泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 供電額定，而非中國 220 V；（4）標示須為泰文並附進口商/許可證持有人身份；（5）須確認驅動器的具體受控產品範圍及適用 TIS 編號/版本，因並非所有驅動器功率範圍均必然受控。當驅動器集成且非獨立銷售時，其證據置於燈具 TIS 技術文件內。出口商應為泰國重新認證驅動器，而非依賴中國 CCC 文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where the LED driver is a controlled product, standalone TIS certification and the TIS mark are required (IEC 61347-2-13-based); where integrated, its evidence forms part of the luminaire TIS file; confirm controlled-product scope and exact TIS number/edition
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14-2014 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED drivers for the Thai market are assessed against the Thai safety standard adopting IEC 61347-2-13; where the driver is a controlled product it needs its own TIS certification and the TIS mark with an in-country licence holder, and where integrated its evidence sits in the luminaire TIS file. The content is broadly harmonised with CN GB 19510.14 via the shared IEC base, but Chinese CCC certification is not accepted for the TIS licence, testing must be by a TISI-recognised laboratory, and the driver must be rated for Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz supply. Confirm the controlled-product scope and exact TIS number/edition for the specific driver.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向泰国市场的 LED 驱动器按采用 IEC 61347-2-13 的泰国安全标准评估；若驱动器为受控产品，须取得其自身的 TIS 认证及 TIS 标志并由在地持证人持有，若集成则其证据置于灯具 TIS 文件内。内容通过共享 IEC 基础与中国 GB 19510.14 基本协调，但中国 CCC 认证不被 TIS 许可所接受，检测须由 TISI 认可实验室进行，且驱动器须按泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 供电额定。请就具体驱动器确认受控产品范围及 TIS 编号/版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向泰國市場的 LED 驅動器按採用 IEC 61347-2-13 的泰國安全標準評估；若驅動器為受控產品，須取得其自身的 TIS 認證及 TIS 標誌並由在地持證人持有，若集成則其證據置於燈具 TIS 文件內。內容通過共享 IEC 基礎與中國 GB 19510.14 基本協調，但中國 CCC 認證不被 TIS 許可所接受，檢測須由 TISI 認可實驗室進行，且驅動器須按泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 供電額定。請就具體驅動器確認受控產品範圍及 TIS 編號/版本。
